note: Incremental re-verify confirming VF-7 (failure-path logging) closed. Delta is reject-path logging with 3 new tests; no acceptance-criteria behavior changed. Full specialist audits from 2026-07-19T02-02-08Z remain valid.

findings.message: Middleware streaming (no-Content-Length) abort->413 path proven only at unit level; TestClient always sets Content-Length so the exception->_send_413 branch isn't exercised through the real app stack. Defensive branches (non-http scope, non-integer CL, response-already-started) untested. (VF-8)
findings.remediation: Accept as a TestClient limitation, or add a raw-ASGI/httpx-transport chunked-body integration test.

findings.message: No expiry reaper — expired quarantine files persist on disk forever (documented MVP deferral). (VF-9)
findings.remediation: Add a reaper (startup sweep and/or periodic task) unlinking files + deleting rows where expires_at <= now.

findings.message: Open-ended dep floors (fastapi/uvicorn/python-multipart); only starlette capped. Mitigated by committed uv.lock. (VF-6)
findings.remediation: Add conservative upper bounds matching tested majors; keep uv.lock committed.
